title: Silly Bloods Modpack
description: The official Modpack for the Silly Bloods server. Adding mods like create, create addons and Valkyrien skies. Along with much more!
body:
**The Silly Bloods modpack is the modpack needed to play on the Silly Bloods minecraft server. You can still download it for free use on any server.**

**Why would you want to download this?**

This modpack is centred around the Create mod, with lots of addons such as [Create: TFMG](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg), [Create Deco](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-deco), and much more! This modpack also adds the [Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) mod, along with some of the [addons](https://wiki.valkyrienskies.org/wiki/List_of_addons). 

**We hope you enjoy using this modpack, even if you are not playing the server!**

_Please download the latest version to join the server. If there is any issues contact me._
